info.name: Hotel List
info.description: Before using the API you will need to get an access token. Please read our **[Authorization Guide](https://developers.amadeus.com/self-service/apis-docs/guides/authorization)** for more information on how to get your token.

item.name: Amadeus Search Hotels Using its Unique ID

query.description: (Required) Amadeus Property Codes (8 chars)
(Required) Amadeus Property Codes (8 chars)

response.name:
Bad Request

 Code | Title  
-----|-----
00001 | CHECK FORMAT
00477 | INVALID FORMAT
00009 | CHECK CITY CODE
01157 | INVALID CITY CODE
03237 | PROPERTY CODE NOT FOUND IN SYSTEM
01257 | INVALID PROPERTY CODE
00895 | NOTHING FOUND FOR REQUESTED CITY
01271 |

query.description: (Required) Amadeus Property Codes (8 chars)

(Required) Amadeus Property Codes (8 chars)

item.name: Amadeus Search Hotels in a City

query.description: (Required) Destination city code or airport code. In case of city  code , the search will be done around the city center. Available codes can be found in [IATA table codes](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) (3 chars IATA Code).
Maximum distance from the geographical coordinates express in defined units. The default unit is metric kilometer.
Unit of measurement used to express the radius. It can be either metric kilometer or imperial mile.
Array of hotel chain codes. Each code is a string consisted of 2 capital alphabetic characters.
List of amenities.
Hotel stars. Up to four values can be requested at the same time in a comma separated list.
Hotel source with values BEDBANK for aggregators, DIRECTCHAIN for GDS/Distribution and ALL for both.

(Required) Destination city code or airport code. In case of city  code , the search will be done around the city center. Available codes can be found in [IATA table codes](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) (3 chars IATA Code).
Maximum distance from the geographical coordinates express in defined units. The default unit is metric kilometer.
Unit of measurement used to express the radius. It can be either metric kilometer or imperial mile.
Array of hotel chain codes. Each code is a string consisted of 2 capital alphabetic characters.
List of amenities.
Hotel stars. Up to four values can be requested at the same time in a comma separated list.
Hotel source with values BEDBANK for aggregators, DIRECTCHAIN for GDS/Distribution and ALL for both.
